style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Meowth's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting cold neon-blue light that casts sharp geometric shadows. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like tiny shards of ice. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
